name: Jesse Watters Primetime
description: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across America to present news with a clear and direct approach.

name: Viva Las Hamptons
description: As Ben Waddell's new girlfriend arrives to the Summer House, she and Ciara Miller bond over manicures: "This is for every bitch who said I don't make friends easily."

name: The Last Word With Lawrence O'Donnell
description: In his signature style, Lawrence O'Donnell goes into depth on the latest news developments and offers his take on the political stories driving the national conversation.

name: The Source With Kaitlan Collins
description: Kaitlan Collins is chasing the facts, asking the tough questions and connecting with her sources.

name: Washington Capitals at Columbus Blue Jackets
description: The Washington Capitals travel to face the Columbus Blue Jackets at Nationwide Arena for a late-season Metropolitan Division matchup. Washington has controlled the regular-season series, winning all t

name: The Godfather
description: Crime boss Vito Corleone and his sons, the ruthless yet loyal members of the Corleone family, rule their secretive New York empire with an iron fist.

name: Jason Bourne
description: The CIA's most dangerous former operative is drawn out of hiding to uncover more explosive truths about his past.

name: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two life sentences for a 1947 double murder land an innocent man in the notorious and corrupt Maine State Penitentiary.

name: Ocean's Eleven
description: Dapper Danny Ocean organizes a gang to steal $150 million from three Las Vegas casinos in a single heist.

name: Bones on the Big Island

name: Days of Thunder
description: An upstart stock-car driver goes to the edge for his manager, his brain-surgeon girlfriend and himself.

name: Fish or Cut Bait
description: Barry is ready to start dating for the first time in 25 years; Kim puts her trust in Lydia's hands; Ethan puts it all on the line in a make-or-break decision.

name: Wanted Drunk or Alive
description: Tickle makes tariff-free apple brandy to help resolve the shortage of American liquor on Canadian shelves. Mike and Jerry learn they're wanted men.

name: The Devil Wears Prada
description: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine.

name: Montreal Canadiens at Philadelphia Flyers

name: The Daily Show
description: A satirical look at news, trends, pop culture, current events, politics, sports and entertainment.

name: The Herb Garden Germination
description: Amy and Sheldon spread gossip as part of an experiment; Howard decides to take a big step in his relationship with Bernadette.
